title: wkappbot exec/run managed launcher + stdin-inject + Ctrl+C/Z control chars
desc: Command wkappbot exec <key> (polymorphic alias: wkappbot run <key>). Launches managed exe OR adopts an already-running one, streams per-second loading/liveness (title + WM_NULL response-ms + blockers + newly-appeared UIA nodes as grap), auto-dismisses startup dialogs, prints OK when ready. --stdin-inject types each stdin line into the focused edit of the child via ValuePattern.SetValue; supports control-char signals: Ctrl+C (0x03) = CloseMainWindow on adopted pid (app-control semantic NOT text-copy; use a11y clipboard-read for copy), Ctrl+Z (0x1A) = undo keystroke forwarded to focused edit. Handles Win11 UWP broker re-attach automatically. --stdin-inject implies --no-pipe + --watch. Built-in test presets include notepad and calc.
steps: wkappbot exec hero4 launches Hero4.exe in piped-stdio mode (default) and polls per second
wkappbot exec hero4 --no-pipe GUI-only UseShellExecute=true + Minimized (no focus steal)
wkappbot exec hero4 --watch stays attached streams per-second a11y diffs until child exits (7d budget)
wkappbot exec hero4 --timeout 1s caps READY wait when caller wants control back early
wkappbot exec hero4 --stdin-inject implies --no-pipe + --watch stdin lines get typed into focused edit via ValuePattern.SetValue
Safety ladder for --stdin-inject (fail-closed): UIA reachable + FocusSafe user-idle guard + focused ProcessId==child + ControlType in Edit or Document + IsPassword==false + last-injected dedup

Control-char signals in stdin-inject: Ctrl+C (0x03) = CloseMainWindow on adopted pid (app-level close semantic NOT text-copy) Ctrl+Z (0x1A) = undo keystroke via SendInput Hotkey(ctrl,z) gated on focused ProcessId==child Ctrl+A (0x01) intentionally NOT handled since ValuePattern.SetValue already replaces full value
Ctrl+C close exit path: on next tick proc.HasExited triggers OK closed-via-ctrl-c (exit 0) never re-attaches
Clipboard copy NOT provided: use wkappbot a11y clipboard-read or direct Windows API
Adoption: if process matching profile.ExeName is already running AND --stdin-inject then adopt existing pid instead of spawning (HTS order-field flow)
UWP broker re-attach: Win11 notepad.exe/calc.exe are App Execution Alias redirectors spawn stub exits then forks real process; watch loop detects HasExited and adopts the real pid by exe name
Spawn path for stdin-inject: AppBotPipe.Spawn(showNoActivate=true) bypasses Start()'s hidden/minimized enforcement and UseShellExecute=true UWP-broker stub

Window-finder guard: already-running check uses Process.GetProcessesByName(exeName) NOT WindowFinder.FindWindows which walks a UIA subtree for Code/Claude/Codex/Chrome windows and false-positives on VS Code tabs containing keywords like Notepad
wkappbot exec list shows built-in keys hero4 heroglobal xingq kiwoom tuhon notepad calc + registered paths
wkappbot exec --register key path.exe register a custom path or override auto-scan
Profile store persists at bin/wkappbot.hq/profiles/run_profiles.json
First launch auto-scans System32 + Program Files + Program Files x86 + C: for matching exe name
Per-second stderr tag [EXEC] +Ns win=title resp=Nms stable=Ns blockers=N dlg=...
Per-new-node tag [EXEC:A11Y] {hwnd:0x...,proc:exe}#ControlType_Aid copy-paste ready into a11y commands
Inject event tag [EXEC:INJECT] ControlType aid=X name=Y len=N or BLOCKED password field or Ctrl+C/Z signal logs
Fast-tick schedule: stdin-inject slices 1s sleep into 150ms probes so keyboard focus response stays near real-time
READY when main title matches pattern AND resp<500ms AND stable>=2s
Polymorphic alias: wkappbot run <key> dispatches to exec when first arg is a known exec key (not a scenario YAML file)
Lifecycle contract: wkappbot NEVER dies before the child app; survives until app exits (user-visible principle)

Design framing: wkappbot exec acts as accessibility narrator for automation agents continuously reads new a11y nodes in grap form reports blockers streams WM_NULL heartbeat treats AI agent downstream like a screen reader treats a blind user
Dynamic stdin source: tail -f feed.txt pipeline works for interactive demos; Ctrl+D closes pipe and wkappbot keeps watching until child exits
Verified 2026-04-19: experience/tests/session/test-session-fix-verify-20260419.sh + live notepad adopt + 3-line dynamic inject + Ctrl+C close observed
author: claude
